query:
select count(*)::int8 as "n!"
              from equipment_items ei
             where ei.kind = $1
               and ($2::text is null or
                    ei.canonical_name ilike $2 or
                    ei.display_name ilike $2 or
                    (ei.brand || ' ' || ei.model ||
                        coalesce(' ' || ei.variant, '')) ilike $2)
               and ($3::text[] is null or ei.brand = any($3))
